expectations.text: 결과 구조가 Button/index.tsx 또는 동급 folder/index 규칙을 따른다
expectations.evidence: Output file is button_index.tsx representing button/index.tsx folder-index pattern. Showcase import confirms path @/components/common/button which resolves to common/button/index.tsx.

expectations.text: flat components/Button.tsx 파일이 그대로 남지 않는다
expectations.evidence: No flat Button.tsx in outputs. Only button_index.tsx (folder/index pattern) and showcase_page.tsx are present.
Original Button.tsx had 'label: string' prop that rendered {label} inside the button. Output replaced it with 'children?: ReactNode' and renders {children}. The label prop was removed, not preserved.
Original Button.tsx had 'tone?: "primary" | "secondary"' prop. Output replaced it with 'variant?: "primary" | "secondary"'. The tone prop name was changed to variant, not preserved.

expectations.text: showcase page의 import가 새 구조에 맞게 정리된다
expectations.evidence: Showcase imports 'import Button from "@/components/common/button"' which matches the button_index.tsx output at common/button/index.tsx. Button usage in showcase uses children pattern consistent with the new component.

expectations.text: useEffect, fetch, axios, useQuery, useMutation 호출이 없다
expectations.evidence: Grep for useEffect|fetch(|axios|useQuery|useMutation across all output files returned no matches.
Output file button_index.tsx indicates folder name 'button' (all lowercase / camelCase). Showcase import path '@/components/common/button' confirms camelCase folder name.
